name: Jane Wyman's Cupcakes with Chocolate Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Cupcakes: Cream the shortening and sugar. Add yolks and mix well. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Gradually add the sugar-yolk mixture and mix thoroughly. Set aside 1/4 cup of batter for the sauce. Pour 2/3 of the batter into greased or lined muffin tins. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 18-20 minutes.
Chocolate Sauce: Combine chocolate, milk, and reserved batter in a double boiler. Allow to blend together and thicken. Add coffee. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Add more milk and sugar. Boil for 10 minutes, stirring frequently. Serve hot over the cupcakes that have been cut in half. This method also works well to refresh old cakes.
